title: Bill Tracker Spreadsheet Template
summary: A no-login bill-tracking workflow that returns monthly and annual totals and exports a copy-ready CSV.
selection_rule: Use this module when the user query is about a bill tracker template and wants a usable spreadsheet flow quickly.

entries.title: Bill Tracker Spreadsheet Template
entries.first_action: Open the page, add your recurring bills with frequency, then click Recalculate and review monthly/annual totals.
entries.smoke_test: Add at least one bill with amount, click Recalculate, and download CSV; verify totals and monthly-equivalent rows are present.
entries.proof_signal: Tool shows formula-based frequency normalization (weekly, biweekly, quarterly, annual to monthly) and generates a CSV export with the same row data.
entries.fallback: Use public references directly: https://finmasters.com/bill-tracker-template/, https://www.vertex42.com/ExcelTemplates/bill-tracker.html, https://www.financialaha.com/free-spreadsheet-templates/personal-budgeting/bill-tracker/ for template ideas.
entries.adoption_metric: organic clicks, qualified tool completions, exports/copies/saves, paid CTA clicks, checkout starts, purchases, and repeat use
